prompt: Create a breathtaking hyper-realistic surreal cinematic artwork of a young adult man walking calmly through the center of a gigantic floating library drifting above the clouds at night. The man is full body, centered slightly left, standing in a confident side-facing pose with one hand in the pocket of a long beige wool overcoat layered over a dark hoodie, black pants, and black-and-white sneakers with subtle gold accents. His face should appear as a soft anonymized placeholder or blurred facial area, while the rest of the body and clothing are sharply detailed. The right side of his coat and body dissolves into a storm of sparkling black ash, glowing golden dust, torn book pages, geometric fragments, feathers, and magical light trails, as if he is transforming into knowledge and stardust. Surround him with an immense vertical fantasy library environment: towering bookshelves lean and curve upward on the left and right edges, with countless books and open pages floating in midair. Include exactly 5 prominent warm glowing lanterns: one near the upper left shelves, one near the upper center-left sky, one near the upper center-right sky, one large lantern at lower right, and one small lantern on the floor near the foreground. Add exactly 3 visible classical marble busts or statues: one large bust at lower left, one small seated or standing statue behind it near the lower left-middle, and one reclining statue at lower right. The ground is made of reflective stone tiles, scattered books, loose pages, small glowing artifacts, and gold filigree-like traces. In the sky, place a bright full moon behind dramatic storm clouds near the top center, casting cool blue rim light through the scene. Use a deep navy night palette with warm amber lantern glow and golden magical particles, high contrast, volumetric light, mist, floating dust, and an epic wide-angle perspective with slight Dutch tilt. Make the composition dense, dynamic, and awe-inspiring, with motion frozen in crisp detail; photorealistic textures, cinematic depth of field, ultra-detailed fantasy realism, no text, no watermark.
